query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `systemSettings` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `key` varchar(191) NOT NULL,
  `value` text NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedBy` int,
  CONSTRAINT `systemSettings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `systemSettings_key_unique` UNIQUE(`key`),
  CONSTRAINT `systemSettings_updatedBy_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`updatedBy`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
);

INSERT INTO `systemSettings` (`key`, `value`, `description`)
VALUES ('mappingCoverageThreshold', '80', 'Minimum percentage of competencies that must have a non-zero total PLO weight for a program to pass validation. Programs below this threshold receive a warning.')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `key` = `key`;

  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `key` varchar(191) NOT NULL,
  `value` text NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

  CONSTRAINT `systemSettings_updatedBy_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`updatedBy`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
);

INSERT INTO `systemSettings` (`key`, `value`, `description`)

ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `key` = `key`;
